'''jachocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qinghaosu|qinghaosu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qinghaosu|qinghaosu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jachocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæchecheth|jæchecheth]] || [[word:jæchechej|jæchechej]] || [[word:jæchechesh|jæchechesh]] || [[word:jæcheche|jæcheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachochochoth|jachochochoth]] || [[word:jachochochoj|jachochochoj]] || [[word:jachochochosh|jachochochosh]] || [[word:jachochocho|jachochocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachochoth|jachochoth]] || [[word:jachochoj|jachochoj]] || [[word:jachochosh|jachochosh]] || [[word:jachocho|jachocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachofchofth|jachofchofth]] || [[word:jachofchofj|jachofchofj]] || [[word:jachofchofsh|jachofchofsh]] || [[word:jachofchof|jachofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jachochotho|jachochotho]] || [[word:jachochojo|jachochojo]] || [[word:jachochosho|jachochosho]] || [[word:jachochoko|jachochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jachochoth|jachochoth]] || [[word:jachochoj|jachochoj]] || [[word:jachochosh|jachochosh]] || [[word:jachocho|jachocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jachochothol|jachochothol]] || [[word:jachochojol|jachochojol]] || [[word:jachochoshol|jachochoshol]] || [[word:jachochokol|jachochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jachochoothotho|jachochoothotho]] || [[word:jachochoojojo|jachochoojojo]] || [[word:jachochooshosho|jachochooshosho]] || [[word:jachochooko|jachochooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jachochothon|jachochothon]] || [[word:jachochojon|jachochojon]] || [[word:jachochoshon|jachochoshon]] || [[word:jachochokon|jachochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jachochothooro|jachochothooro]] || [[word:jachochojooro|jachochojooro]] || [[word:jachochoshooro|jachochoshooro]] || [[word:jachochokooro|jachochokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
